router/anime/*.json dist/router/anime/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp -r router/anime/*.ttf dist/router/anime/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp -r router/anime/*.otf dist/router/anime/ 2>/dev/null || true && mkdir -p dist/router/asupan && cp -r router/asupan/*.json dist/router/asupan/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp -r router/asupan/*.ttf dist/router/asupan/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp -r router/asupan/*.otf dist/router/asupan/ 2>/dev/null || true && mkdir -p dist/router/cecan && cp -r router/cecan/*.json dist/router/cecan/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp -r router/cecan/*.ttf dist/router/cecan/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp -r router/cecan/*.otf dist/router/cecan/ 2>/dev/null || true && mkdir -p dist/router/fun && cp -r router/fun/*.json dist/router/fun/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp -r router/fun/*.ttf dist/router/fun/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp -r router/fun/*.otf dist/router/fun/ 2>/dev/null || true && mkdir -p dist/router/maker && cp -r router/maker/*.json dist/router/maker/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp -r router/maker/*.ttf dist/router/maker/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp -r router/maker/*.otf dist/router/maker/ 2>/dev/null || true && mkdir -p dist/router/random && cp -r router/random/*.json dist/router/random/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp -r router/random/*.ttf dist/router/random/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp -r router/random/*.otf dist/router/random/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp -r 'router/maker/Arial Bold.ttf' dist/router/maker/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp -r router/maker/Charine.otf dist/router/maker/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp -r router/maker/Nunito-MediumItalic.ttf router/maker/arial.ttf dist/router/maker/ 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.pm2: pm2 start index.ts --name kuroneko --interpreter node --node-args="-r ts-node/register" && pm2 save
